Name: Storytime!
Description: Let's start the league with a good story!  A narrative song like a mini-movie, unfolding a story with character(s), event(s), and plot(s).

Name: Out of the ordinary
Description: A song from a band or artist that is known mainly for a certain style of music, but they made a song (or a few) that is not their usual style. Example, a heavy metal band that had a country song.

Name: Excellently Explicit
Description: A song with E for explicit lyrics. Cover your kid's ears! (Song *must* have an 'E' rating in Spotify, which doesn't always mean it will have a bad word.)

Name: Kids songs
Description: After all those bad words, let's now go for songs with no 'E' rating and your kid(s) or your kiddie self (when you were 11 or younger) enjoy(ed)!

Name: Short and Sweet (or not)
Description: Songs not longer than 2minutes and 30 seconds! Let's end the league with a short fuse, lol....
